title: Obama Presidential Center Opens Today. Every Living President — Except One.
script: Every president — except one? The Obama Presidential Center officially opens today in Chicago. The center is built in the Woodlawn neighborhood on the South Side — Barack Obama's home turf — and today's invite-only ceremony begins at 11 a.m. Central Time. Performers include Bruce Springsteen, Stevie Wonder, Jennifer Hudson, John Legend, Common, and Eddie Vedder. Every living former president will be there. Donald Trump will not. The public gets access tomorrow. The library and museum took years of controversy over community impact before breaking ground — and today it finally opens. It's a $700 million project next to Jackson Park and the lakefront. The Obama Foundation plans a free watch party at Midway Plaisance if you want to be close. So: what would you ask Barack Obama on day one?
